{ "name": "psr/simple-cache", "description": "Common interfaces for simple caching", "keywords": ["psr", "psr-16", "cache", "simple-cache", "caching"], "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "PHP-FIG", "homepage": "https://www.php-fig.org/" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.0.0" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Psr\\SimpleCache\\": "src/" } }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-master": "3.0.x-dev" } } }
